name: integration__to_get_your_website_seen_on_chatgpt_ge
method: to get your website seen on chatgpt, gemini, and the rest, do this:1. add a detailed summary about your product or services as an llms.txt file on your website 2. then submit the page to these websit

phases.name: inventory
steps: parse OPS/DEPLOYMENT_URLS.md for all live site URLs
categorize sites by type (app landing, marketplace, tool, affiliate)

phases.name: generate
steps: generate llms.txt for each site using structured template (name, description, features, pricing, URL)
generate llms-full.txt with extended detail per llms.txt spec

phases.name: deploy
steps: write llms.txt to each surge.sh site via surge deploy
verify llms.txt is accessible at each URL/llms.txt

phases.name: submit
steps: submit to any additional discovered directories
